THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAGOVSKY, VICTOR BROTHMAN, JULIANO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 FREDERICK ST, SF, CA; FIRST BEDROOM EAST OF MAIN DOOR $2,125.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,125.60, LEASE FORFEITED
